title: Halt Method, Spel Class
syntax:
Sub Halt (TaskNumber As Integer)

Sub Halt (TaskName As String)
parameters:
TaskNumber	The
		 task number of the task to be suspended. The range of the task
		 number is 1 to 32.

TaskName	A
		 string expression containing the name of the task to be suspended.

Note

The function executed by Call method cannot be stopped/paused by Stop, Pause, Halt, or Quit method.

If you need to stop or pause, use Xqt Method.
description: Suspends execution of the specified task.
